amazonmq.configuration.AuthenticationStr.Description: Optional. The authentication strategy associated with the configuration. The default is `SIMPLE`.

amazonmq.configuration.EngineType.Description: The type of broker engine. Note: Currently, Amazon MQ only supports ACTIVEMQ for creating and editing broker configurations.

amazonmq.configuration.EngineVersion.Description: The version of the broker engine. For a list of supported engine versions, see [https://docs.aws.amazon.com/amazon-mq/latest/developer-guide/broker-engine.html](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/amazon-mq/latest/developer-guide/broker-engine.html)

amazonmq.configuration.Name.Description: The name of the configuration. This value can contain only alphanumeric characters, dashes, periods, underscores, and tildes (- . _ ~). This value must be 1-150 characters long.

amazonmq.configuration.Tags.Description: Create tags when creating the configuration.
